user.title: Studio Panel
user.description: Enable the Studio Panel settings API.

set_password.title: Set settings password
set_password.description: Replace the Studio Panel settings password used to unlock the panel settings screen.

clear_password.title: Clear settings password
clear_password.description: Remove the stored password. The next time Settings is opened in the panel, it will ask for a new password.

edit_settings.title: Edit panel settings
edit_settings.description: Update the saved Studio Panel configuration as raw JSON stored in Home Assistant.

reset_settings.title: Reset all panel settings
reset_settings.description: Delete all saved panel settings from Home Assistant. The panel will rebuild its defaults from current entities on next load.
